name: Brother Edwyn
goal: Survive and reseal the vault's inner ward before whatever broke it open returns for what it left behind
disposition: Frightened and injured but clear-headed; will share what he knows about who hired him to investigate and what name appeared in the Crestfall temple records

name: Sera Dobb
goal: Recover a specific item from the vault's grave goods — a sealed iron coffer she believes contains evidence her uncle hid here years ago — and leave before anyone connects her to the broken ward
disposition: Calculating and self-possessed; will not volunteer information about her family name, and will lie smoothly if pressed

name: Vrath
goal: Destroy the living who have entered his tomb and reclaim the grave goods scattered throughout the vault by whoever woke him
disposition: Implacable; does not parley; retains enough of the warlord's tactical mind to position and wait rather than charge
